languages.text: "Пусть Омниссия дарует вам благословение за то, что помогли отверзнуть очи Его! Вероятность нарушения универсальных законов в данной точке была очень велика, но технодуховенство Алтаря требовало уточнить оценку до десятых в третьей степени".

"May the Omnissiah grant you His blessing for helping to open His eyes! The probability of violating the Universal Laws at the site was extremely high, but Altar's tech-clergy demanded that the estimate be specified to a tenth of a third of a degree."
languages.original_text: "Пусть Омниссия дарует вам благословение за то, что помогли отверзнуть очи Его! Вероятность нарушения универсальных законов в данной точке была очень велика, но технодуховенство Алтаря требовало уточнить оценку до десятых в третьей степени".

"May the Omnissiah grant you His blessing for helping to open His eyes! The probability of violating the Thirteenth Universal Law at this point was extremely high, but Altar's tech-clergy demanded that the estimate be specified to a tenth of a third of a degree."

"May the Omnissiah grant you His blessing for helping to open His eyes! The probability of violating the Universal Laws at the site was extremely high, but Altar's tech-clergy demanded that the estimate be specified to a tenth of a third of a degree."

languages.text: 「全知なる神が、彼の目を覚ます手助けをしたあなたに祝福を授けられますように！この時点で第13の普遍法則を犯す確率は極めて高かったが、アルタールの技術神職は、その推定を3分の1の10分の1の精度で示すことを要求した」
languages.original_text: "May the Omnissiah grant you His blessing for helping to open His eyes! The probability of violating the Thirteenth Universal Law at this point was extremely high, but Altar's tech-clergy demanded that the estimate be specified to a tenth of a third of a degree."

traits.locale_text: 「全知なる神が、彼の目を覚ます手助けをしたあなたに祝福を授けられますように！この時点で第13の普遍法則を犯す確率は極めて高かったが、アルタールの技術神職は、その推定を3分の1の10分の1の精度で示すことを要求した」

languages.text: «¡Que el Omnissiah le bendiga por contribuir a abrir sus ojos! La probabilidad de que se vulnerara la Ley Universal era elevada, pero el tecnoclérigo de Altar exigía que la estimación se especificara hasta una décima de tercio de grado».
languages.original_text: "May the Omnissiah grant you His blessing for helping to open His eyes! The probability of violating the Universal Laws at the site was extremely high, but Altar's tech-clergy demanded that the estimate be specified to a tenth of a third of a degree."

traits.locale_text: «¡Que el Omnissiah le bendiga por contribuir a abrir sus ojos! La probabilidad de que se vulnerara la Ley Universal era elevada, pero el tecnoclérigo de Altar exigía que la estimación se especificara hasta una décima de tercio de grado».

languages.text: “愿欧姆尼赛亚赐福于您，因您助祂扩展视界！虽说此处违反普适准则的概率极高，但祭坛的技术教士要求将估算值精确到三分之一度的十分之一。”
languages.original_text: "May the Omnissiah grant you His blessing for helping to open His eyes! The probability of violating the Universal Laws at the site was extremely high, but Altar's tech-clergy demanded that the estimate be specified to a tenth of a third of a degree."

traits.locale_text: “愿欧姆尼赛亚赐福于您，因您助祂扩展视界！虽说此处违反普适准则的概率极高，但祭坛的技术教士要求将估算值精确到三分之一度的十分之一。”

languages.text: "Möge der Omnissiah Euch segnen, weil Ihr Ihm die Augen geöffnet habt! Die Wahrscheinlichkeit einer Verletzung der Universalgesetze war extrem hoch, aber die Techpriesterschaft des Altars verlangte eine Spezifizierung der Einschätzung auf ein Zehntel eines Drittelgrades."
languages.original_text: "May the Omnissiah grant you His blessing for helping to open His eyes! The probability of violating the Universal Laws at the site was extremely high, but Altar's tech-clergy demanded that the estimate be specified to a tenth of a third of a degree."

traits.locale_text: "Möge der Omnissiah Euch segnen, weil Ihr Ihm die Augen geöffnet habt! Die Wahrscheinlichkeit einer Verletzung der Universalgesetze war extrem hoch, aber die Techpriesterschaft des Altars verlangte eine Spezifizierung der Einschätzung auf ein Zehntel eines Drittelgrades."

languages.text: "Hermesih, gözlerini açmaya yardım ettiğiniz için size lütfunu bahşetsin! Bu noktada Evrensel Yasaların ihlal edilme olasılığı son derece yüksek olsa da Altar'ın tekno ruhban sınıfı, tahminin bir derecenin üçte birinin onda biri hassasiyetinde belirtilmesini talep etti."
languages.original_text: "May the Omnissiah grant you His blessing for helping to open His eyes! The probability of violating the Universal Laws at the site was extremely high, but Altar's tech-clergy demanded that the estimate be specified to a tenth of a third of a degree."

traits.locale_text: "Hermesih, gözlerini açmaya yardım ettiğiniz için size lütfunu bahşetsin! Bu noktada Evrensel Yasaların ihlal edilme olasılığı son derece yüksek olsa da Altar'ın tekno ruhban sınıfı, tahminin bir derecenin üçte birinin onda biri hassasiyetinde belirtilmesini talep etti."

languages.text: « Que l'Omnimessie vous bénisse pour avoir contribué à Lui ouvrir les yeux ! La probabilité d'infraction de la Loi Universelle sur ce site était extrêmement élevée, mais le techno-clergé d'Altar a exigé que l'estimation soit précisée au dixième du tiers d'un degré. »
languages.original_text: "May the Omnissiah grant you His blessing for helping to open His eyes! The probability of violating the Universal Laws at the site was extremely high, but Altar's tech-clergy demanded that the estimate be specified to a tenth of a third of a degree."
